info.name: Technology Service - Project Management
info.description: Postman collection for technology services and project management features: Technical Services, Categories, Project creation & lifecycle, Project management, Business participation & work tracking, Communication & access control, Status transitions

request.description: Check the health status of the technology service

Get all visible technical services (Public)

**Query Parameters:**
- `page` (integer, optional): Page number (default: 1)
- `limit` (integer, optional): Items per page (default: 10)
- `category` (string, optional): Filter by category
- `isVisible` (boolean, optional): Filter by visibility status
- `search` (string, optional): Search by title
- `userId` (string, optional): Filter by user ID (creator)

Get single technical service details (Public)

**Path Parameters:**
- `serviceId` (string, required): The service ID

Get all active technical categories (Public)

**Query Parameters:**
- `page` (integer, optional): Page number (default: 1)
- `limit` (integer, optional): Items per page (default: 50)
- `isActive` (boolean, optional): Filter by active status

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Web Development",
  "description": "Professional web development services",
  "category": "Web Development",
  "photo": "https://example.com/photo.jpg",
  "tag": "frontend",
  "displayOrder": 1,
  "isVisible": true
}

request.description:
Create technical service (User/Agency/Business)

**Body Parameters:**
- `title` (string, required): Service title
- `description` (string, required): Service description
- `category` (string, required): Category name
- `photo` (string, optional): Service photo URL
- `tag` (string, optional): Service tag
- `displayOrder` (integer, optional): Display order
- `isVisible` (boolean, optional): Visibility status (default: true)

Create technical service (User only)

**Body Parameters:**
- `title` (string, required): Service title
- `description` (string, required): Service description
- `category` (string, required): Category name

Create technical service (Agent/Agency only)

**Body Parameters:**
- `title` (string, required): Service title
- `description` (string, required): Service description
- `category` (string, required): Category name

Update technical service (User owns service)

**Path Parameters:**
- `serviceId` (string, required): The service ID to update

**Body Parameters:**
- `title` (string, optional): Updated service title
- `description` (string, optional): Updated description
- `category` (string, optional): Updated category name
- `photo` (string, optional): Updated service photo URL
- `tag` (string, optional): Updated service tag
- `displayOrder` (integer, optional): Updated display order
- `isVisible` (boolean, optional): Updated visibility status

Update technical service (Agent/Agency owns service)

**Path Parameters:**
- `serviceId` (string, required): The service ID to update

**Body Parameters:**
- `title` (string, optional): Updated service title
- `description` (string, optional): Updated description
- `category` (string, optional): Updated category name
- `photo` (string, optional): Updated service photo URL
- `tag` (string, optional): Updated service tag
- `displayOrder` (integer, optional): Updated display order
- `isVisible` (boolean, optional): Updated visibility status

Delete technical service (User owns service)

**Path Parameters:**
- `serviceId` (string, required): The service ID to delete

Delete technical service (Agent/Agency owns service)

**Path Parameters:**
- `serviceId` (string, required): The service ID to delete

Get all technical services (Admin)

**Query Parameters:**
- `page` (integer, optional): Page number (default: 1)
- `limit` (integer, optional): Items per page (default: 10)
- `category` (string, optional): Filter by category
- `isVisible` (boolean, optional): Filter by visibility status
- `userId` (string, optional): Filter by user ID (creator)
- `search` (string, optional): Search by title

Get single technical service details (Admin)

**Path Parameters:**
- `serviceId` (string, required): The service ID

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Admin Updated Service",
  "description": "Updated by admin",
  "category": "Web Development",
  "photo": "https://example.com/updated-photo.jpg",
  "tag": "backend",
  "displayOrder": 2,
  "isVisible": true
}

request.description:
Update technical service (Admin)

**Path Parameters:**
- `serviceId` (string, required): The service ID to update

**Body Parameters:**
- `title` (string, optional): Updated service title
- `description` (string, optional): Updated description
- `category` (string, optional): Updated category name
- `photo` (string, optional): Updated service photo URL
- `tag` (string, optional): Updated service tag
- `displayOrder` (integer, optional): Updated display order
- `isVisible` (boolean, optional): Updated visibility status

Delete technical service (Admin)

**Path Parameters:**
- `serviceId` (string, required): The service ID to delete

Toggle service visibility (Admin)

**Path Parameters:**
- `serviceId` (string, required): The service ID

**Body Parameters:**
- `isVisible` (boolean, required): Visibility status to set

Reorder service in list (Admin)

**Path Parameters:**
- `serviceId` (string, required): The service ID

**Body Parameters:**
- `direction` (string, required): Reorder direction (up, down)

Create technical category (Admin)

**Body Parameters:**
- `name` (string, required): Name of the category
- `description` (string, optional): Category description
- `displayOrder` (integer, optional): Display order
- `isActive` (boolean, optional): Active status (default: true)

Get all technical categories (Admin)

**Query Parameters:**
- `page` (integer, optional): Page number (default: 1)
- `limit` (integer, optional): Items per page (default: 50)
- `isActive` (boolean, optional): Filter by active status

Get single category details (Admin)

**Path Parameters:**
- `categoryId` (string, required): The category ID

Update category (Admin)

**Path Parameters:**
- `categoryId` (string, required): The category ID

**Body Parameters:**
- `name` (string, optional): Updated category name
- `description` (string, optional): Updated description
- `displayOrder` (integer, optional): Updated display order
- `isActive` (boolean, optional): Updated active status

Delete category (Admin)

**Path Parameters:**
- `categoryId` (string, required): The category ID to delete

Create a new project

**Body Parameters:**
- `title` (string, required): Project title
- `description` (string, required): Project description
- `startDate` (string, optional): Start date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `endDate` (string, optional): End date (YYYY-MM-DD)

query.description: Filter by project status (draft, active, completed, archived)

request.description:
Get projects for authenticated user

**Query Parameters:**
- `page` (integer, optional): Page number (default: 1)
- `limit` (integer, optional): Items per page (default: 10)
- `status` (string, optional): Filter by status (draft, active, completed, archived)
- `search` (string, optional): Search by title
- `createdBy` (string, optional): Filter by creator user ID

Get single project details

**Path Parameters:**
- `projectId` (string, required): The project ID

Update project details

**Path Parameters:**
- `projectId` (string, required): The project ID

**Body Parameters:**
- `title` (string, optional): Updated project title
- `description` (string, optional): Updated description
- `status` (string, optional): Project status (draft, active, completed, archived)
- `startDate` (string, optional): Updated start date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `endDate` (string, optional): Updated end date (YYYY-MM-DD)

Delete a project

**Path Parameters:**
- `projectId` (string, required): The project ID to delete

Add participant to project

**Path Parameters:**
- `projectId` (string, required): The project ID

**Body Parameters:**
- `userId` (string, required): User ID of the participant
- `userName` (string, required): Name of the participant
- `role` (string, required): Participant role (owner, admin, member, viewer)
- `accountType` (string, required): Account type (user, agency, business)

Update participant role in project

**Path Parameters:**
- `projectId` (string, required): The project ID
- `userId` (string, required): The participant's user ID

**Body Parameters:**
- `role` (string, required): New role (owner, admin, member, viewer)

Create task in project

**Path Parameters:**
- `projectId` (string, required): The project ID

**Body Parameters:**
- `title` (string, required): Task title
- `description` (string, optional): Task description
- `assignedTo` (string, optional): User ID to assign task to
- `dueDate` (string, optional): Due date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `priority` (integer, optional): Priority level (0=low, 1=medium, 2=high)

query.description: Filter by task status (todo, in_progress, completed)

request.description:
Get tasks for project

**Path Parameters:**
- `projectId` (string, required): The project ID

**Query Parameters:**
- `page` (integer, optional): Page number (default: 1)
- `limit` (integer, optional): Items per page (default: 10)
- `status` (string, optional): Filter by status (todo, in_progress, completed)
- `assignedTo` (string, optional): Filter by assigned user
- `search` (string, optional): Search by title
- `projectId` (string, optional): Filter by project ID

Get single task details

**Path Parameters:**
- `taskId` (string, required): The task ID

Update task details

**Path Parameters:**
- `taskId` (string, required): The task ID

**Body Parameters:**
- `title` (string, optional): Updated task title
- `description` (string, optional): Updated description
- `status` (string, optional): Task status (todo, in_progress, completed)
- `priority` (integer, optional): Priority level (0=low, 1=medium, 2=high)
- `assignedTo` (string, optional): Updated assignee user ID
- `dueDate` (string, optional): Updated due date (YYYY-MM-DD)

Delete a task

**Path Parameters:**
- `taskId` (string, required): The task ID to delete

Post message to project

**Path Parameters:**
- `projectId` (string, required): The project ID

**Body Parameters:**
- `messageType` (string, required): Message type (general, update, comment, system)
- `content` (string, required): Message content

Get messages for project

**Path Parameters:**
- `projectId` (string, required): The project ID

Get single message details

**Path Parameters:**
- `messageId` (string, required): The message ID

Update message content

**Path Parameters:**
- `messageId` (string, required): The message ID

**Body Parameters:**
- `content` (string, required): Updated message content

Delete a message

**Path Parameters:**
- `messageId` (string, required): The message ID to delete

Transition project status from Draft to Active

**Path Parameters:**
- `projectId` (string, required): The project ID

**Body Parameters:**
- `status` (string, required): New status (active)

Transition project status from Active to Completed

**Path Parameters:**
- `projectId` (string, required): The project ID

**Body Parameters:**
- `status` (string, required): New status (completed)

item.name: Update Task Status (Todo to In Progress)

request.description:
Transition task status from Todo to In Progress

**Path Parameters:**
- `taskId` (string, required): The task ID

**Body Parameters:**
- `status` (string, required): New status (in_progress)

item.name: Update Task Status (In Progress to Completed)

request.description:
Transition task status from In Progress to Completed

**Path Parameters:**
- `taskId` (string, required): The task ID

**Body Parameters:**
- `status` (string, required): New status (completed)

variable.description: API prefix for technology service routes
